Everything On the Plate, Refilled without asking Twice

One thali, a full Kathiyawadi spread. Every katori is topped up the moment it runs low — "unlimited" promise.

Bajra & Wheat Rotli

Hot off the tawa, hand-patted the Kathiyawadi way.

Two Seasonal Shaak

🍛

Dal & Kadhi

🍚

Steamed Rice

Soft rice to go with dal and kadhi, refilled on request.

🥛

Chhas / Curd

Cooling chhas to balance the masala — bottomless glass.

🥗

Sweet bite & Salad

Fresh salad, fryums/papad, pickle and a sweet bite.
